text: vehamelekh david zaqen ba bayamim vayekhasuhu babegadim velo yicham lov
vayomeru lov 'avadayv yevaqeshu ladoni hamelekh na'ara vetula ve'ameda lifeney hamelekh utehi-lov sokhenet veshakheva vecheyqekha vecham ladoni hamelekh
vayevaqeshu na'ara yafa bekhol gevul yiserael vayimetseu et-avishag hashunamit vayaviu otah lamelekh
vehana'ara yafa 'ad-meod vatehi lamelekh sokhenet vatesharetehu vehamelekh lo yeda'ah
vaadoniya ven-chagit mitenase lemor ani emelokh vaya'as lov rekhev ufarashim vachamishim ish ratsim lefanayv
velo-'atsavov aviv miyamayv lemor madu'a kakha 'asita vegam-hu tovv-toar meod veotov yaleda acharey aveshalovm
vayiheyu devarayv 'im yovav ben-tseruya ve'im eveyatar hakohen vaya'ezeru acharey adoniya
vetsadovq hakohen uvenayahu ven-yehovyada' venatan hanavi veshime'i vere'i vehagibovrim asher ledavid lo hayu 'im-adoniyahu
vayizebach adoniyahu tson uvaqar umeri 'im even hazochelet asher-etsel 'eyn rogel vayiqera et-kal-echayv beney hamelekh ulekhal-aneshey yehuda 'avedey hamelekh
veet-natan hanavi uvenayahu veet-hagibovrim veet-shelomo achiv lo qara
vayomer natan el-bat-sheva' em-shelomo lemor halov shama'at ki malakh adoniyahu ven-chagit vaadoneynu david lo yada'
ve'ata lekhi i'atsekh na 'etsa umaleti et-nafeshekh veet-nefesh benekh shelomo
lekhi uvoi ׀ el-hamelekh david veamaret elayv halo-ata adoni hamelekh nisheba'eta laamatekha lemor ki-shelomo venekh yimelokh acharay vehu yeshev 'al-kisei umadu'a malakh adoniyahu ׃
hine 'ovdakh medaberet sham 'im-hamelekh vaani avov acharayikh umileti et-devarayikh
vatavo vat-sheve' el-hamelekh hachadera vehamelekh zaqen meod vaavishag hashunamit mesharat et-hamelekh
vatiqod bat-sheva' vatishetachu lamelekh vayomer hamelekh mah-lakh
vatomer lov adoni ata nisheba'eta bayhva eloheykha laamatekha ki-shelomo venekh yimelokh acharay vehu yeshev 'al-kisei
ve'ata hine adoniya malakh ve'ata adoni hamelekh lo yada'eta
vayizebach shovr umeri-vetson larov vayiqera lekhal-beney hamelekh uleeveyatar hakohen uleyoav sar hatsava velishelomo 'avedekha lo qara
veata adoni hamelekh 'eyney khal-yiserael 'aleykha lehagid lahem mi yeshev 'al-kise adoni-hamelekh acharayv
vehaya kishekhav adoni-hamelekh 'im-avotayv vehayiti ani uveni shelomo chataim
vehine 'ovdena medaberet 'im-hamelekh venatan hanavi ba
vayagidu lamelekh lemor hine natan hanavi vayavo lifeney hamelekh vayishetachu lamelekh 'al-apayv aretsa
vayomer natan adoni hamelekh ata amareta adoniyahu yimelokh acharay vehu yeshev 'al-kisei
ki ׀ yarad hayovm vayizebach shovr umeri-vetson larov vayiqera lekhal-beney hamelekh ulesarey hatsava uleeveyatar hakohen vehinam okhelim veshotim lefanayv vayomeru yechi hamelekh adoniyahu
veli ani-'avedekha uletsadoq hakohen velivenayahu ven-yehovyada' velishelomo 'avedekha lo qara
im meet adoni hamelekh niheya hadavar haze velo hovda'eta et 'avedeykha kh 'avedekha q mi yeshev 'al-kise adoni-hamelekh acharayv s
vaya'an hamelekh david vayomer qireu-li levat-shava' vatavo lifeney hamelekh vata'amod lifeney hamelekh
vayishava' hamelekh vayomar chay-yehva asher-pada et-nafeshi mikal-tsara
ki kaasher nisheba'eti lakh bayhva elohey yiserael lemor ki-shelomo venekh yimelokh acharay vehu yeshev 'al-kisei tachetay ki ken e'ese hayovm haze
vatiqod bat-sheva' apayim erets vatishetachu lamelekh vatomer yechi adoni hamelekh david le'olam f
vayomer ׀ hamelekh david qireu-li letsadovq hakohen ulenatan hanavi velivenayahu ben-yehovyada' vayavou lifeney hamelekh
vayomer hamelekh lahem qechu 'imakhem et-'avedey adoneykhem vehirekavetem et-shelomo veni 'al-hapireda asher-li vehovradetem otov el-gichovn
umashach otov m tsadovq hakohen venatan hanavi lemelekh 'al-yiserael uteqa'etem bashovfar vaamaretem yechi hamelekh shelomo
va'alitem acharayv uva veyashav 'al-kisei vehu yimelokh tachetay veotov tsiviti liheyovt nagid 'al-yiserael ve'al-yehuda
vaya'an benayahu ven-yehovyada' et-hamelekh vayomer ׀ amen ken yomar yehva elohey adoni hamelekh
kaasher haya yehva 'im-adoni hamelekh ken yehi kh yiheye q 'im-shelomo vigadel et-kiseov mikise adoni hamelekh david
vayered tsadovq hakohen venatan hanavi uvenayahu ven-yehovyada' vehakereti vehapeleti vayarekivu et-shelomo 'al-piredat hamelekh david vayolikhu otov 'al-gichovn
vayiqach tsadovq hakohen et-qeren hashemen min-haohel vayimeshach et-shelomo vayiteqe'u bashovfar vayomeru kal-ha'am yechi hamelekh shelomo
vaya'alu khal-ha'am acharayv veha'am mechalelim bachalilim usemechim simecha gedovla vatibaqa' haarets beqovlam
vayishema' adoniyahu vekhal-haqeruim asher itov vehem kilu leekhol vayishema' yovav et-qovl hashovfar vayomer madu'a qovl-haqireya hovma
'ovdenu medaber vehine yovnatan ben-eveyatar hakohen ba vayomer adoniyahu bo ki ish chayil ata vetovv tevaser
vaya'an yovnatan vayomer laadoniyahu aval adoneynu hamelekhe-david himelikh et-shelomo
vayishelach itov-hamelekh et-tsadovq hakohen veet-natan hanavi uvenayahu ben-yehovyada' vehakereti vehapeleti vayarekivu otov 'al piredat hamelekh
vayimeshechu otov tsadovq hakohen venatan hanavi lemelekh begichovn vaya'alu misham semechim vatehom haqireya hu haqovl asher shema'etem
vegam yashav shelomo 'al kise hamelukha
vegam-bau 'avedey hamelekh levarekh et-adoneynu hamelekh david lemor yeytev eloheykha kh elohim q et-shem shelomo mishemekha vigadel et-kiseov mikiseekha vayishetachu hamelekh 'al-hamishekav
vegam-kakha amar hamelekh barukh yehva elohey yiserael asher natan hayovm yoshev 'al-kisei ve'eynay roovt
vayecheredu vayaqumu kal-haqeruim asher laadoniyahu vayelekhu ish ledarekov
vaadoniyahu yare mipeney shelomo vayaqam vayelekh vayachazeq beqarenovt hamizebecha
vayugad lishelomo lemor hine adoniyahu yare et-hamelekh shelomo vehine achaz beqarenovt hamizebecha lemor yishava'-li khayovm hamelekh shelomo im-yamit et-'avedov becharev
vayomer shelomo im yiheye leven-chayil lo-yipol misa'aratov aretsa veim-ra'a timatse-vov vamet
vayishelach hamelekh shelomo vayoriduhu me'al hamizebecha vayavo vayishetachu lamelekh shelomo vayomer-lov shelomo lekh leveytekha f
vayiqerevu yemey-david lamut vayetsav et-shelomo venov lemor
anokhi holekh bederekh kal-haarets vechazaqeta vehayita leish

veshamareta et-mishemeret ׀ yehva eloheykha lalekhet biderakhayv lishemor chuqotayv mitseotayv umishepatayv ve'edeotayv kakatuv betovrat moshe lema'an tasekil et kal-asher ta'ase veet kal-asher tifene sham
lema'an yaqim yehva et-devarov asher diber 'alay lemor im-yishemeru vaneykha et-darekam lalekhet lefanay beemet bekhal-levavam uvekhal-nafesham lemor lo-yikaret lekha ish me'al kise yiserael

vegam ata yada'eta et asher-'asa li yovav ben-tseruya asher 'asa lisheney-sarey tsiveovt yiserael leavener ben-ner vela'amasa ven-yeter vayaharegem vayasem demey-milechama beshalom vayiten demey milechama bachagoratov asher bematenayv uvena'alov asher beragelayv
ve'asita kechakhematekha velo-tovred seyvatov beshalom sheol s
veliveney varezilay hagile'adi ta'aseh-chesed vehayu beokheley shulechanekha ki-khen qarevu elay bevarechi mipeney aveshalovm achikha
vehine 'imekha shime'i ven-gera ven-hayemini mibachurim vehu qilelani qelala nimeretset beyovm lekheti machanayim vehu-yarad liqerati hayareden vaeshava' lov vayhva lemor im-amitekha becharev

uleeveyatar hakohen amar hamelekh 'anatot lekh 'al-sadeykha ki ish mavet ata uvayovm haze lo amitekha ki-nasata et-arovn adonay yehovi lifeney david avi vekhi hite'anita bekhol asher-hite'ana avi
vayegaresh shelomo et-eveyatar miheyovt kohen layhva lemale et-devar yehva asher diber 'al-beyt 'eli beshilo f
vehashemu'a baa 'ad-yovav ki yovav nata acharey adoniya veacharey aveshalovm lo nata vayanas yovav el-ohel yehva vayachazeq beqarenovt hamizebecha
vayugad lamelekh shelomo ki nas yovav el-ohel yehva vehine etsel hamizebecha vayishelach shelomo et-benayahu ven-yehovyada' lemor lekh pega'-bov
vayavo venayahu el-ohel yehva vayomer elayv koh-amar hamelekh tse vayomer ׀ lo ki fo amut vayashev benayahu et-hamelekh davar lemor koh-diber yovav vekho 'anani
vayomer lov hamelekh 'ase kaasher diber ufega'-bov uqevaretov vahasirota ׀ demey chinam asher shafakh yovav me'alay ume'al beyt avi

veheshiv yehva et-damov 'al-roshov asher paga' bisheney-anashim tsadiqim vetovim mimenu vayaharegem bacherev veavi david lo yada' et-avener ben-ner sar-tseva yiserael veet-'amasa ven-yeter sar-tseva yehuda

vehaya ׀ beyovm tsetekha ve'avareta et-nachal qiderovn yado'a teda' ki movt tamut damekha yiheye veroshekha
vayomer shime'i lamelekh tovv hadavar kaasher diber adoni hamelekh ken ya'ase 'avedekha vayeshev shime'i birushalaim yamim rabim s

veata im-telekh lefanay kaasher halakh david avikha betam-levav uveyosher la'asovt kekhol asher tsivitikha chuqay umishepatay tishemor

im-shovv teshuvun atem uveneykhem meacharay velo tishemeru mitseotay chuqotay asher natati lifeneykhem vahalakhetem va'avadetem elohim acherim vehishetachavitem lahem

veameru 'al asher 'azevu et-yehva eloheyhem asher hovtsi et-avotam meerets mitserayim vayachaziqu belohim acherim vayishetachu kh vayishetachavu q lahem vaya'avedum 'al-ken hevi yehva 'aleyhem et kal-hara'a hazot f
vayehi miqetse 'eserim shana asher-bana shelomo et-sheney habatim et-beyt yehva veet-beyt hamelekh
chiram melekhe-tsor nisa et-shelomo ba'atsey arazim uva'atsey verovshim uvazahav lekhal-chefetsov az yiten hamelekh shelomo lechiram 'eserim 'ir beerets hagalil
vayetse chiram mitsor lireovt et-he'arim asher natan-lov shelomo velo yasheru be'eynayv
vayomer ma he'arim haele asher-natata li achi vayiqera lahem erets kavul 'ad hayovm haze f

veze devar-hamas asher-he'ela ׀ hamelekh shelomo livenovt et-beyt yehva veet-beytov veet-hamilov veet chovmat yerushalaim veet-chatsor veet-megidov veet-gazer
pare'o melekhe-mitserayim 'ala vayilekod et-gezer vayiserefah baesh veet-hakena'ani hayoshev ba'ir harag vayitenah shiluchim levitov eshet shelomo
vayiven shelomo et-gazer veet-beyt choron tachetovn
veet-ba'alat veet tamar kh tademor q bamidebar baarets
veet kal-'arey hamisekenovt asher hayu lishelomo veet 'arey harekhev veet 'arey haparashim veet ׀ chesheq shelomo asher chashaq livenovt birushalaim uvalevanovn uvekhol erets memeshaletov
kal-ha'am hanovtar min-haemori hachiti haperizi hachivi vehayevusi asher lo-mibeney yiserael hema
beneyhem asher noteru achareyhem baarets asher lo-yakhelu beney yiserael lehacharimam vaya'alem shelomo lemas-'oved 'ad hayovm haze
umibeney yiserael lo-natan shelomo 'aved ki-hem aneshey hamilechama va'avadayv vesarayv veshalishayv vesarey rikhebov ufarashayv s
ele ׀ sarey hanitsavim asher 'al-hamelakha lishelomo chamishim vachamesh meovt harodim ba'am ha'osim bamelakha
akh bat-pare'o 'aleta me'ir david el-beytah asher banah-lah az bana et-hamilov
vehe'ela shelomo shalosh pe'amim bashana 'olovt ushelamim 'al-hamizebecha asher bana layhva vehaqeteyr itov asher lifeney yehva veshilam et-habayit
vaoni 'asa hamelekh shelomo be'etseyovn-gever asher et-elovt 'al-sefat yam-suf beerets edovm
vayishelach chiram baoni et-'avadayv aneshey oniyovt yode'ey hayam 'im 'avedey shelomo
vayavou ovfira vayiqechu misham zahav areba'-meovt ve'eserim kikar vayaviu el-hamelekh shelomo f
umalekat-sheva shoma'at et-shema' shelomo leshem yehva vatavo lenasotov bechidovt
vatavo yerushalaema bechayil kaved meod gemalim noseim besamim vezahav rav-meod veeven yeqara vatavo el-shelomo vatedaber elayv et kal-asher haya 'im-levavah
vayaged-lah shelomo et-kal-devareyha lo-haya davar ne'elam min-hamelekh asher lo higid lah
vatere malekat-sheva et kal-chakhemat shelomo vehabayit asher bana
umaakhal shulechanov umovshav 'avadayv uma'amad mesharetov kh mesharetayv q umalebusheyhem umasheqayv ve'olatov asher ya'ale beyt yehva velo-haya vah 'ovd rucha
vatomer el-hamelekh emet haya hadavar asher shama'eti bearetsi 'al-devareykha ve'al-chakhematekha
velo-heemaneti ladevarim 'ad asher-bati vatireeyna 'eynay vehine lo-hugad-li hachetsi hovsafeta chakhema vatovv el-hashemu'a asher shama'eti
asherey anasheykha asherey 'avadeykha ele ha'omedim lefaneykha tamid hashome'im et-chakhematekha
yehi yehva eloheykha barukh asher chafets bekha letitekha 'al-kise yiserael beahavat yehva et-yiserael le'olam vayesimekha lemelekh la'asovt mishepat utsedaqa
vatiten lamelekh mea ve'eserim ׀ kikar zahav uvesamim harebe meod veeven yeqara lo-va khabosem hahu 'ovd larov asher-natena malekat-sheva lamelekh shelomo
vegam oni chiram asher-nasa zahav meovfir hevi meofir 'atsey alemugim harebe meod veeven yeqara

levad meaneshey hatarim umisechar harokhelim vekhal-malekhey ha'erev ufachovt haarets
vaya'as hamelekh shelomo matayim tsina zahav shachut shesh-meovt zahav ya'ale 'al-hatsina haechat
ushelosh-meovt maginim zahav shachut sheloshet manim zahav ya'ale 'al-hamagen haechat vayitenem hamelekh beyt ya'ar halevanovn f

usheneym 'asar arayim 'omedim sham 'al-shesh hama'alovt mize umize lo-na'asa khen lekhal-mamelakhovt
vekhol keley masheqe hamelekh shelomo zahav vekhol keley beyt-ya'ar halevanovn zahav sagur eyn kesef lo necheshav bimey shelomo limeuma
ki oni tareshish lamelekh bayam 'im oni chiram achat leshalosh shanim tavov ׀ oni tareshish noseet zahav vakhesef shenehabim veqofim vetukiyim
vayigedal hamelekh shelomo mikol malekhey haarets le'osher ulechakhema
vekhal-haarets mevaqeshim et-peney shelomo lishemo'a et-chakhematov asher-natan elohim belibov
vehema meviim ish minechatov keley khesef ukheley zahav uselamovt venesheq uvesamim susim uferadim devar-shana beshana s

vayiten hamelekh et-hakesef birushalaim kaavanim veet haarazim natan kashiqemim asher-bashefela larov
umovtsa hasusim asher lishelomo mimitserayim umiqeve socharey hamelekh yiqechu miqeve bimechir
vata'ale vatetse merekava mimitserayim beshesh meovt kesef vesus bachamishim umea vekhen lekhal-malekhey hachitim ulemalekhey aram beyadam yotsiu f
